task: Grab the block and place it at the designated location
raw:
SCENE ANALYSIS - A small brown block is on a light brown cardboard surface. A blue box is on a white cloth to the right. The block is a small cube with a matte finish; the box is a rectangular prism with a blue top. STRATEGY - Reach the block, grasp it, transport it to the blue box, and place it inside. Failure modes include dropping the block during transport or misaligning it with the box. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the block at its body; Step 2 grasp the block at its top face for a stable hold; Step 3 transport the block to the box; Step 4 place the block inside the box.
Goal: inside(block, blue_box)
Scene: block, blue_box, cardboard, white_cloth
Step 1: reach(block)
  affordance_region: the body of the block
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, block, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, block) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(block)
  affordance_region: the top face of the block
  contact: holding(block) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(block)
Step 3: transport(block -> blue_box)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the blue box
  spatial: above(block, blue_box, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(block)
  done_when: above(block, blue_box, 0.05)
Step 4: place(block -> blue_box)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the blue box
  contact: surface_contact(block, blue_box) [completion]; released(block) [completion]
  pose: stable(block) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(block, blue_box) AND released(block)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the top face of the block
an empty area inside the blue box
an empty area inside the blue box
